magesguild.name: Mages Guild
magesguild.description: The ancient, bureaucratic institution regulating the use of magic across the continent. They value order, tradition, and permits.

archivefoundation.name: Archive Foundation
archivefoundation.description: A secretive organization dedicated to hoarding history and controlling information. They believe knowledge is dangerous and must be contained.

hypercapitalistcollective.name: Hypercapitalist Collective
hypercapitalistcollective.description: A ruthless alliance of merchant-kings and tycoons who believe the free market is the only true god.

loyalists.name: Loyalists
loyalists.description: Those who adhere strictly to the Grandmaster's decrees, favoring political stability over magical innovation.

traditionalists.name: Traditionalists
traditionalists.description: Hardliners who reject technology and believe magic should remain pure, esoteric, and elitist.

technomancers.name: Technomancers
technomancers.description: Radicals attempting to fuse arcane sigils with combustion engines and heavy machinery.

92schoolsbranch.name: 92 schools branch
92schoolsbranch.description: An academic splinter group obsessed with categorizing every minute variation of spellcasting into rigid schools.

eriscourt.name: Eris' Court
eriscourt.description: Followers of the Goddess of Discord, seeking to disrupt the boring order of the Guilds and Foundation.

naguka.name: Naguka
naguka.description: A tribe of swamp-dwelling scavengers known for their resistance to industrial toxins.

verden.name: Verden
verden.description: Forest goblins who wage guerilla warfare against the expansion of heavy industry.

truckerssociety.name: Truckers Society
truckerssociety.description: The brave souls who transport goods across the wastelands. They are the lifeblood of the economy and obey no road laws.

northpointarmy.name: North Point Army
northpointarmy.description: A disciplined military force protecting the northern borders from whatever lurks in the frozen wastes.

invertedcitadel.name: Inverted Citadel
invertedcitadel.description: A fortress hanging from the ceiling of a massive cavern, home to outcasts and dark scholars.

petrodemons.name: Petrodemons
petrodemons.description: Entities born from deep earth oil deposits; living fuel that burns with malice.

petromanagers.name: Petromanagers
petromanagers.description: Middle-managers who have signed infernal pacts to maximize oil extraction efficiency.

speeddemons.name: Speed demons
speeddemons.description: Adrenaline junkies and couriers who worship velocity and high-octane fuel.

sevensisters.name: Seven Sisters
sevensisters.description: The seven ruling families that hold a monopoly on all fuel production.

thegods.name: The Gods
thegods.description: The divine pantheon overseeing the realms, largely indifferent to mortal suffering.

supremearchivistcouncil.name: Supreme Archivist Council
supremearchivistcouncil.description: The elders who decide which truths are remembered and which are erased forever.

dataacquisitiondepartment.name: Data Acquisition Department
dataacquisitiondepartment.description: Field agents and spies tasked with stealing secrets and recovering lost artifacts.

knowledgepreservationdivision.name: Knowledge Preservation Division
knowledgepreservationdivision.description: Librarians who maintain the physical integrity of the books and silence noisy patrons... permanently.

publictransparencyunit.name: Public Transparency Unit
publictransparencyunit.description: The propaganda wing. Their name is ironic; they specialize in redaction and misinformation.

internalcomplianceunit.name: Internal Compliance Unit
internalcomplianceunit.description: The secret police ensuring no Archivist leaks data to the outside world.

libertariangods.name: Libertarian Gods
libertariangods.description: Minor deities who demand no worship, only mutually beneficial transactions.

goblincollectiveunconsciuous.name: Goblin Collective Unconsciuous
goblincollectiveunconsciuous.description: The psychic link that connects all goblin minds, storing their ancestral chaotic wisdom.

thetourists.name: The Tourists
thetourists.description: Aliens from Zeta Reticuli viewing this world's conflicts as mere entertainment.

holyvaticanempire.name: Holy Vatican Empire
holyvaticanempire.description: The ancient seat of the Papacy, a city-state that wields immense spiritual and temporal power. It operates on faith, tradition, and clandestine operations.

cardinalscouncil.name: Cardinal's Council
cardinalscouncil.description: The secretive inner circle of cardinals who advise the Pope and control the Church's political machinations.

ior.name: IOR
ior.description: The Institute for the Works of Religion, the Vatican's controversial bank, rumored to handle funds from less-than-holy sources.

battlenuns.name: Battle Nuns
battlenuns.description: An order of militant nuns trained in both scripture and modern combat, serving as the Vatican's special forces.

hexorcistscorp.name: Hexorcists Corp
hexorcistscorp.description: A specialized unit of tech-priests who combat demonic code, rogue AIs, and other digital heresies.

gaylobby.name: Gay Lobby
gaylobby.description: A powerful and influential shadow group within the Vatican, advocating for progressive reforms from within the ancient institution.

opusdei.name: Opus Dei
opusdei.description: A deeply conservative and secretive lay organization known for its members' unwavering devotion and influence in secular society.

swissguards.name: Swiss Guards
swissguards.description: The colorfully-dressed but deadly elite mercenaries sworn to protect the Pope, wielding both halberds and advanced plasma rifles.

ussr.name: USSR
ussr.description: The mighty military force of the Soviet Union, renowned for its discipline, massive numbers, and unwavering ideology.

guardsdivision.name: Guards Division
guardsdivision.description: Elite Soviet units that have distinguished themselves in battle, bearing the prestigious 'Guards' title.

tankdivision.name: Tank Division
tankdivision.description: Armored forces equipped with T-34s and heavy tanks, the iron fist of the Red Army.

rifledivision.name: Rifle Division
rifledivision.description: The backbone of the Red Army, brave riflemen who hold the line against all odds.

airbornedivision.name: Airborne Division
airbornedivision.description: Elite paratroopers and airborne forces, striking from the skies behind enemy lines.

artillerydivision.name: Artillery Division
artillerydivision.description: Heavy artillery and rocket forces, the 'God of War' that rains destruction upon the enemy.

ottomanempire.name: Ottoman Empire
ottomanempire.description: The Great Empire that never fell. A vast, multi-ethnic powerhouse ruling from Istanbul, blending centuries-old traditions with modern military and covert technology. It is led by the Sultan-Caliph.

tanzimatbureaucracy.name: Tanzimat Bureaucracy
tanzimatbureaucracy.description: The sprawling, highly structured, and often corrupt administrative core of the Empire, modernizing with ruthless efficiency.

imperialsubmarinefleet.name: Imperial Submarine Fleet
imperialsubmarinefleet.description: The silent service of the Ottoman Navy. Utilizing high-tech stealth and torpedo systems to maintain control of the Mediterranean and Black Seas.

talonofthecaliph.name: Talon of the Caliph
talonofthecaliph.description: The Sultan-Caliph's secret police and intelligence agency, focusing on both domestic dissent and foreign espionage. They are the true 'eyes and ears' of the Empire.

janissaryguard.name: Janissary Guard
janissaryguard.description: A small, highly-trained detachment of modern Janissaries serving as the Sultan-Caliph's personal guard and elite shock troops.

britannia.name: Britannia
britannia.description: The successor to the British Empire, a global power defined by its technological superiority, vast Commonwealth resources, and disciplined military. Ruled by a modern Constitutional Monarchy.

royalnavytaskforce.name: Royal Navy Task Force
royalnavytaskforce.description: The core strength of Britannia, deploying advanced frigates, aircraft carriers, and hydrofoil transports to maintain global sea lanes.

sassbscommandos.name: SAS/SBS Commandos
sassbscommandos.description: The legendary Special Air Service and Special Boat Service. Highly trained, stealthy, and equipped with advanced personal cloaking and data systems.

mi6blackarchive.name: MI6 Black Archive
mi6blackarchive.description: Britannia's most clandestine intelligence division, dealing in high-level technological espionage, psychological warfare, and global political manipulation.

sciencecommand.name: Science Command
sciencecommand.description: A joint military-scientific division responsible for developing and deploying cutting-edge plasma weaponry, kinetic defense systems, and power armour.
